BatchGetSecretValue.description: Grants permission to retrieve and decrypt a list of secrets

CancelRotateSecret.description: Grants permission to cancel an in-progress secret rotation

CreateSecret.description: Grants permission to create a secret that stores encrypted data that can be queried and rotated

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the resource policy attached to a secret

DeleteSecret.description: Grants permission to delete a secret

DescribeSecret.description: Grants permission to retrieve the metadata about a secret, but not the encrypted data

GetRandomPassword.description: Grants permission to generate a random string for use in password creation

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to get the resource policy attached to a secret

GetSecretValue.description: Grants permission to retrieve and decrypt the encrypted data

ListSecretVersionIds.description: Grants permission to list the available versions of a secret

ListSecrets.description: Grants permission to list the available secrets

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to attach a resource policy to a secret

PutSecretValue.description: Grants permission to create a new version of the secret with new encrypted data

RemoveRegionsFromReplication.description: Grants permission to remove regions from replication

ReplicateSecretToRegions.description: Grants permission to convert an existing secret to a multi-Region secret and begin replicating the secret to a list of new regions

RestoreSecret.description: Grants permission to cancel deletion of a secret

RotateSecret.description: Grants permission to start rotation of a secret

StopReplicationToReplica.description: Grants permission to remove the secret from replication and promote the secret to a regional secret in the replica Region

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a secret

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a secret

UpdateSecret.description: Grants permission to update a secret with new metadata or with a new version of the encrypted data

UpdateSecretVersionStage.description: Grants permission to move a stage from one secret to another

ValidateResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to validate a resource policy before attaching policy

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a key that is present in the request the user makes to the Secrets Manager service

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the list of all the tag key names present in the request the user makes to the Secrets Manager service

secretsmanager:AddReplicaRegions.description: Filters access by the list of Regions in which to replicate the secret

secretsmanager:BlockPublicPolicy.description: Filters access by whether the resource policy blocks broad AWS account access

secretsmanager:Description.description: Filters access by the description text in the request

secretsmanager:ExternalSecretRotationRol.description: Filters access by the managed external secret rotation role ARN in the request

secretsmanager:ForceDeleteWithoutRecover.description: Filters access by whether the secret is to be deleted immediately without any recovery window

secretsmanager:ForceOverwriteReplicaSecr.description: Filters access by whether to overwrite a secret with the same name in the destination Region

secretsmanager:KmsKeyArn.description: Filters access by the key ARN of the KMS key in the request

secretsmanager:KmsKeyId.description: Filters access by the key identifier of the KMS key in the request. Deprecated: Use secretsmanager:KmsKeyArn

secretsmanager:ModifyRotationRules.description: Filters access by whether the rotation rules of the secret are to be modified

secretsmanager:Name.description: Filters access by the friendly name of the secret in the request

secretsmanager:RecoveryWindowInDays.description: Filters access by the number of days that Secrets Manager waits before it can delete the secret

secretsmanager:ResourceTag/tag-key.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair

secretsmanager:RotateImmediately.description: Filters access by whether the secret is to be rotated immediately

secretsmanager:RotationLambdaARN.description: Filters access by the ARN of the rotation Lambda function in the request

secretsmanager:SecretId.description: Filters access by the SecretID value in the request

secretsmanager:SecretPrimaryRegion.description: Filters access by primary region in which the secret is created if the secret is a multi-Region secret

secretsmanager:Type.description: Filters access by the managed external secret type in the request

secretsmanager:VersionId.description: Filters access by the unique identifier of the version of the secret in the request

secretsmanager:VersionStage.description: Filters access by the list of version stages in the request

secretsmanager:resource/AllowRotationLam.description: Filters access by the ARN of the rotation Lambda function associated with the secret

secretsmanager:resource/Type.description: Filters access by the managed external secret type associated with the secret
